---
title: "Figure3_FMT_ZZ"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
library(ggpubr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggsignif)


pf <- read.csv('../utils/colorPalette.csv', stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
palette_vec <- setNames(trimws(pf$x), trimws(pf$X))

response <- read.csv("ref/DonorRecipientMapping.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    donor     = str_remove(donor, "_.*") %>% str_replace_all("-", "."),
    recipient = str_remove(recipient, "-.*")
  )

superdonor_ob <- "SRR9224383"
superdonor2   <- "SRR9224196"
worst1        <- "SRR9224548"
secondworst   <- "SRR9224546"

highlight_ids <- c(superdonor_ob, superdonor2, worst1, secondworst)

# Shared color palette for the 4 focal donors
donor_colors <- c(
  "Superdonor 1" = "firebrick2",
  "Superdonor 2" = "salmon",
  "Others"       = "grey70",
  "Worst 1"      = "steelblue3",
  "Worst 2"      = "lightblue3"
)

donor_levels <- c("Superdonor 1", "Superdonor 2", "Others", "Worst 1", "Worst 2")


```

3c
```{r}
bc_diss <- read.csv("data/3c_bcdiss_goll.csv")

Figure_3c <- bc_diss %>%
  mutate(recipient = as.character(recipient)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-recipient, names_to = "donor", values_to = "value") %>%
  left_join(response %>% select(recipient, donor, clinical_response), .,
            by = c("recipient","donor")) %>%
  mutate(
    clinical_response = factor(clinical_response, c("responder","non-responder")),
    engraft = (1 - value) * 100
  ) %>% na.omit() %>% ggplot(aes(x = clinical_response, y = engraft)) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.35, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = clinical_response),
              height = 0, width = 0.2, alpha = 0.75, size = 1.6) +
stat_compare_means(
  comparisons = list(c("responder","non-responder")),
  method = "t.test",
  method.args = list(alternative = "greater"),   # <-- use method.args
 # label = "p.format",
 label = "p.signif",
  tip.length = 0.01, size = 5
) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + #don't let significance asterisk get clipped off
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Response",
    values = c(responder = "#FFD700", `non-responder` = "grey70")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Clinical response", y = "% Engraftment") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10))

Figure_3c 

ggsave('../figure_3/figures/Figure3c.png', height = 3.5, width = 3.5
)

```

UPDATED FIGURES 3E:
```{r}


mat <- read.csv("./data/3F.csv") %>% column_to_rownames('recipient') %>% as.matrix()# +min(mat)+.01
mat <- (mat - min(mat, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(mat, na.rm = TRUE) - min(mat, na.rm = TRUE)) #scale from 0 to 1?


# rows: recipients; cols: features (abundances)
d_row <- vegan::vegdist(mat, method = "euclidean")
d_col <- vegan::vegdist(t(mat), method = "euclidean")

row_ord <- hclust(d_row, method = "average")$order
col_ord <- hclust(d_col, method = "average")$order

rec_levels <- rownames(mat)[row_ord]
don_levels <- colnames(mat)[col_ord]

# reshape and factor‐level set
plot_df <- read.csv("./data/3F.csv") %>%
  mutate(recipient = factor(recipient, levels = rec_levels)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-recipient, names_to="donor", values_to="engraftment") %>%
  mutate(donor = factor(donor, levels = don_levels))

#identify highest donor 
superdonor_ob <- (plot_df %>% select(donor, engraftment) %>% group_by(donor) %>% 
  mutate(med_engraft = median(engraftment)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  select(donor, med_engraft) %>% distinct() %>% filter(med_engraft == max(med_engraft)) %>% mutate(donor = as.character(donor)))$donor

# attach response info
highlight_df <- plot_df %>%
  inner_join(response %>% 
               mutate(recipient = as.character(recipient),
                      donor     = as.character(donor)),
             by = c("recipient","donor"))

#get quantiles
#qs <- quantile(1-mat, probs = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1))

# plot with colored borders
tile <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(donor, recipient, fill = engraftment)) +
  geom_tile(color = 'white', size = 0.15) +
  geom_tile(fill = NA, color = 'white', size = .2) +
  geom_tile(
    data = highlight_df,
    aes(color = clinical_response),
    fill  = NA,
    size  = .66
  ) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette   = "RdBu",
    direction =  -1,       # 1 for blue→white→red, -1 to flip
    name      = "Engraftment"
  ) + # scale_color_discrete(name = "Response") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(responder="#FFD700", "non-responder"="grey70")) +
  theme_cowplot() +
    labs(fill = '% Engraftment', color = 'Clinical response', x = 'Donors', y = 'Recipients') +
  theme(
    #axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    #axis.title  = element_blank(),
    legend.position = 'top',
    legend.title.position = "top",
    legend.title.align    = 0.5  
  )

tile 

ggsave("figures/Figure3E.pdf", width = 6, height = 3.5)

```

Add the boxplots above
```{r}



# ── Prep the data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
box_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(engraft_scaled = (engraftment - min(engraftment, na.rm = TRUE)) /
           (max(engraftment, na.rm = TRUE) - min(engraftment, na.rm = TRUE)),
         donor = gsub("-", "\\.", donor)) %>%
  mutate(donor = factor(donor, levels = colnames(mat)[col_ord]),
         donor_group = case_when(
           donor == gsub("-", "\\.", superdonor_ob) ~ "Superdonor 1",
           donor == gsub("-", "\\.", superdonor2)   ~ "Superdonor 2",
           donor == gsub("-", "\\.", worst1)        ~ "Worst 1",
           donor == gsub("-", "\\.", secondworst)   ~ "Worst 2",
           TRUE                                    ~ "Others"
         ),
         donor_group = factor(donor_group, levels = donor_levels))

# ── Arrow annotation data ────────────────────────────────────────────────
arrow_df <- box_df %>%
  filter(donor_group != "Others") %>%
  group_by(donor, donor_group) %>%
  summarise(median_eng = median(engraft_scaled, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    x_pos  = as.numeric(donor),
    y_start = -0.12,
    y_end   = -0.04
  )

# ── Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggplot(box_df, aes(x = donor, y = engraft_scaled, fill = donor_group)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(.25, .75), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA, color = "black") +
  geom_segment(
    data = arrow_df,
    aes(x = x_pos, xend = x_pos, y = y_start, yend = y_end, color = donor_group),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.12, "cm"), type = "closed"),
    linewidth = 0.7,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = donor_colors, name = "Donor") +
  scale_color_manual(values = donor_colors, guide = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.15, 1), clip = "off") +
  labs(x = "", y = "Engraftment") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 15, 5)
  )

ggsave("figures/engraftmentRates_3e.pdf", width = 6, height = 1.5)

#write out engraftment scores
plot_df %>%
  mutate(engraft_scaled = (engraftment - min(engraftment, na.rm = TRUE)) /
           (max(engraftment, na.rm = TRUE) - min(engraftment, na.rm = TRUE)),
         donor = gsub("-","\\.", donor)) %>% group_by(donor) %>% 
  mutate(med_engraft = median(engraft_scaled)) %>% 
  select(donor, med_engraft) %>% distinct() %>%
  write.csv("data/MedianEngraftmentScores_Openbiome.csv", quote = F, row.names = F)




```




Does Donor or Recipient control FMT success?

```{r}



set.seed(123)
n_boot <- 100
frac <- 0.5

boot_var <- map_dfr(seq_len(n_boot), function(i) {
  sub <- plot_df %>% slice_sample(prop = frac)
  
  total_var <- var(sub$engraftment)
  
  # Variance of donor means = between-donor variance
  donor_var <- sub %>%
    group_by(donor) %>%
    summarise(mean_eng = mean(engraftment), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pull(mean_eng) %>%
    var()
  
  # Variance of recipient means = between-recipient variance
  recipient_var <- sub %>%
    group_by(recipient) %>%
    summarise(mean_eng = mean(engraftment), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pull(mean_eng) %>%
    var()
  
  tibble(iter = i,
         Donor = donor_var / total_var * 100,
         Recipient = recipient_var / total_var * 100)
})

boot_long <- boot_var %>%
  pivot_longer(-iter, names_to = "factor", values_to = "pct_variance") %>%
  mutate(factor = factor(factor, levels = c("Donor", "Recipient")))


# Plot
p <- ggplot(boot_long, aes(x = factor, y = pct_variance)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "grey90") +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.15) +
  ggsignif::geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("Donor", "Recipient")), test = "wilcox.test") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "% of total variance explained",
  #  title = "Donor vs. recipient contribution to engraftment variance",
  #  subtitle = paste0(n_boot, " subsamples at ", frac * 100, "% of data")
  ) +
  theme_cowplot()

print(p)

boot_long %>%
  group_by(factor) %>%
  summarise(median = median(pct_variance), se = sd(pct_variance))

#ggsave("subsample_variance.pdf", p, width = 4.5, height = 5)
#ggsave("subsample_variance.png", p, width = 4.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```




Deprecated strategy using lm
```{r}

anova(lm(engraftment ~ donor + recipient, data = plot_df))
# Analysis of Variance Table
# 
# Response: engraftment
#             Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
# donor       95 13.976 0.14712  28.881 < 2.2e-16 ***
# recipient   26 17.387 0.66873 131.278 < 2.2e-16 ***
# Residuals 2470 12.582 0.00509         


```
